── ARUBA OS-CX / AOS-Switch (HPE) ─────────────────────────────────────────

Sintaxe similar ao Cisco IOS. NÃO inclua configure/end.

VLAN:
  ["vlan <VLAN_ID>", "name <NOME_VLAN>", "exit"]

Interface acesso:
  ["interface 1/1/1",
   "no shutdown",
   "vlan access <VLAN_ID>",
   "spanning-tree port-type admin-edge",
   "exit"]

Interface trunk (uplink):
  ["interface 1/1/2",
   "no shutdown",
   "vlan trunk allowed <VLAN_A>,<VLAN_B>",
   "vlan trunk native <VLAN_NATIVA>",
   "exit"]

Interface com Voice VLAN (dados untagged + voz tagged):
  ["interface 1/1/3",
   "no shutdown",
   "vlan access <VLAN_DADOS>",
   "vlan voice <VLAN_VOZ>",
   "spanning-tree port-type admin-edge",
   "exit"]

Desativar porta:
  ["interface 1/1/5", "shutdown", "exit"]

Reativar porta:
  ["interface 1/1/5", "no shutdown", "exit"]

Interface L3 VLAN (SVI):
  ["interface vlan <VLAN_ID>",
   "ip address 192.168.100.1/24",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

DHCP relay (dentro da interface VLAN):
  ["interface vlan <VLAN_ID>",
   "ip helper-address 10.0.0.1",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

LAG / Port-channel:
  ["interface lag 1",
   "no shutdown",
   "lacp mode active",
   "exit",
   "interface 1/1/1",
   "no shutdown",
   "lag 1",
   "exit",
   "interface 1/1/2",
   "no shutdown",
   "lag 1",
   "exit"]

Rota estática:
  ["ip route 10.10.10.0/24 192.168.1.254"]

Rota padrão:
  ["ip route 0.0.0.0/0 192.168.1.254"]

ACL:
  ["ip access-list FM-PERMIT-HTTPS",
   "10 permit tcp 192.168.1.0/24 10.0.0.50/32 eq 443",
   "exit",
   "interface 1/1/1",
   "ip access-group FM-PERMIT-HTTPS in",
   "exit"]

STP — global:
  Modo RSTP:                   ["spanning-tree mode rpvst"]
  BPDU Guard global:           ["spanning-tree bpduguard default"]
  Desativar BPDU Guard global: ["no spanning-tree bpduguard default"]
  Ativar STP:                  ["spanning-tree"]
  Desativar STP:               ["no spanning-tree"]

STP — por porta (dentro do bloco de interface):
  Edge port (portfast):        "spanning-tree port-type admin-edge"
  Desativar edge:              "no spanning-tree port-type admin-edge"
  BPDU Guard por porta:        "spanning-tree bpduguard enable"
  Desativar BPDU Guard:        "no spanning-tree bpduguard enable"
  Root Guard por porta:        "spanning-tree root-guard"

REGRAS IMPORTANTES PARA ARUBA:
- Interface naming: 1/1/X (slot/módulo/porta)
- BPDU Guard e edge port são configurados por interface (não globais por padrão)
- voice vlan adiciona a VLAN de voz tagged mantendo a VLAN de dados untagged
- LAG usa "interface lag N" + "lag N" dentro de cada membro

── LIST_VLANS (aruba): ssh_show_commands: ["show vlans"]

── LIST_PORTS (aruba):
  Geral:            ssh_show_commands: ["show interfaces brief"]
  Porta específica: ssh_show_commands: ["show interface 1/1/1", "show running-config interface 1/1/1"]
  Combinado:        ssh_show_commands: ["show vlans", "show interfaces brief"]

── GET_INFO exemplos (aruba):
  ssh_show_commands: ["show running-config"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show ip interface brief"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show version"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show mac-address-table"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show arp"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show spanning-tree"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show lldp neighbors"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show ip route"]
